holdings.infoBox: FLN is an equity ETF with a total of 55 individual holdings. The top holdings are Coca-Cola Femsa SAB de CV CPO Terms:3 Shs-B- + 5 Shs-L- stock at 3.72%, Fibra UNO at 3.59%, Eneva at 3.45%, Enel Chile at 3.29%, and Companhia Paranaense de Energia - COPEL at 3.26%.

overview.description: The First Trust Latin America AlphaDEX Fund (FLN) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NASDAQ AlphaDEX Latin America index. The fund tracks an index of Latin American firms screened based on a proprietary methodology, using various factors and weighted in tiers. FLN was launched on Apr 18, 2011 and is issued by First Trust.
